categories.label: Developer Tools
categories.description: Source control, CI/CD, and code platforms.

categories.label: Local Files
categories.description: Local file system and editor integration.

servers.name: Filesystem
servers.description: Read, write, and navigate files on your computer with configurable access controls.
servers.setupNotes: Replace <PATH> with one or more directories to expose, e.g. /Users/you/projects.

servers.name: Fetch
servers.description: Fetch web content and convert HTML to markdown for efficient LLM use.

servers.name: Git
servers.description: Read, search, and manipulate local Git repositories.
servers.setupNotes: Replace <REPO_PATH> with the absolute path to a git repository.

servers.name: Memory
servers.description: Knowledge-graph based persistent memory across conversations.

servers.name: Sequential Thinking
servers.description: Structured step-by-step reasoning and reflective problem-solving.

servers.name: Time
servers.description: Time and timezone conversions.

servers.name: Everything
servers.description: Test server exercising all MCP protocol features (prompts, resources, tools).

servers.name: GitHub
servers.description: Official GitHub MCP server. Create issues, manage PRs, search code, and more.

envVars.name: GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN
envVars.description: Fine-grained or classic PAT with required repo scopes.

servers.setupNotes: Runs locally via Docker with a PAT. A hosted remote MCP is also available at https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/ (OAuth, Copilot required).

servers.name: GitLab
servers.description: Official GitLab MCP server. Manage projects, issues, merge requests, and pipelines.

envVars.name: GITLAB_TOKEN
envVars.description: GitLab personal access token with api scope.

servers.name: Sentry
servers.description: Official Sentry MCP server. Query issues, releases, and error details.
servers.setupNotes: Remote server uses OAuth in-app; no static env var required.

servers.name: Atlassian (Jira + Confluence)
servers.description: Official remote Atlassian MCP server covering Jira, Confluence, and Compass.
servers.setupNotes: Uses OAuth flow in Claude on first use; no token required here.

servers.name: Linear
servers.description: Official Linear MCP server. Query issues, projects, and cycles via OAuth.
servers.setupNotes: Uses OAuth. No static env var required.

servers.name: Notion
servers.description: Official Notion MCP server. Search and edit pages, databases, and blocks.

envVars.name: OPENAPI_MCP_HEADERS
envVars.description: JSON object with Authorization and Notion-Version headers.

servers.name: Stripe
servers.description: Official Stripe MCP server. Query customers, charges, subscriptions, and products.

envVars.name: STRIPE_API_KEY
envVars.description: Stripe secret key (use a restricted key when possible).

servers.name: Cloudflare
servers.description: Official Cloudflare MCP. Manage Workers, Pages, KV, R2, DNS, and observability.
servers.setupNotes: Uses OAuth via Cloudflare. Cloudflare publishes multiple tool-specific MCP endpoints — see repo for the full list.

servers.name: Vercel
servers.description: Official Vercel MCP server. Deploy, query projects, and manage environments.
servers.setupNotes: Uses OAuth. Authenticate via Claude on first use.

servers.name: Netlify
servers.description: Official Netlify MCP server. Manage sites, deploys, and environment variables.
servers.setupNotes: Authenticates via Netlify CLI login.

servers.name: AWS (AWS Labs)
servers.description: Official AWS MCP servers from AWS Labs. Query S3, DynamoDB, CloudWatch and more.

envVars.name: AWS_PROFILE
envVars.description: AWS CLI profile name to use.

servers.setupNotes: Uses your local AWS credentials. Pick a specific awslabs.* server for targeted features.

servers.name: Azure
servers.description: Official Microsoft Azure MCP server. Query resources, subscriptions, and services.
servers.setupNotes: Uses Azure CLI login (`az login`).

servers.name: Azure DevOps
servers.description: Official Microsoft Azure DevOps MCP server. Manage repos, work items, and pipelines.

servers.name: PostgreSQL
servers.description: Read-only SQL access to a Postgres database via the official reference server.
servers.setupNotes: Replace the connection string in the args. Archived reference but still widely used.

servers.name: SQLite
servers.description: Query and explore a local SQLite database.
servers.setupNotes: Replace <PATH_TO_DB> with the path to your .sqlite file.

servers.name: MongoDB
servers.description: Official MongoDB MCP server. Query collections and run aggregations.

servers.name: Redis
servers.description: Official Redis MCP server. Inspect keys, run commands, and query data.
servers.setupNotes: Replace <REDIS_URL> with your Redis connection URL (redis://...). REDIS_HOST/REDIS_PORT/REDIS_PASSWORD env vars are also supported as an alternative.

servers.name: Neon
servers.description: Official Neon MCP server. Manage serverless Postgres branches and queries.
servers.setupNotes: Remote MCP uses OAuth (recommended). For local stdio, run `npx -y @neondatabase/mcp-server-neon start <NEON_API_KEY>` instead.

servers.name: Supabase
servers.description: Official Supabase MCP server. Query Postgres, manage auth, and edge functions.
servers.setupNotes: Remote MCP uses OAuth (recommended). Append `?read_only=true&project_ref=<ref>` to scope. For local stdio, use `@supabase/mcp-server-supabase` with SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN instead.

servers.name: BigQuery
servers.description: Query Google BigQuery datasets from Claude.
servers.setupNotes: Replace <GCP_PROJECT_ID>. Uses Application Default Credentials (gcloud auth).

servers.name: Snowflake
servers.description: Official Snowflake Labs MCP server. Query warehouses and Cortex AI.
servers.setupNotes: Env vars are the simple path; a connections.toml config file is also supported.

servers.name: DuckDB
servers.description: Query DuckDB / Parquet / CSV datasets in place.

envVars.name: MOTHERDUCK_TOKEN
envVars.description: MotherDuck token (leave empty to run fully local DuckDB).

servers.name: Turso
servers.description: Query Turso / libSQL databases at the edge.

servers.name: Playwright
servers.description: Official Microsoft Playwright MCP. Control a headless browser with accessibility tree.

servers.name: Chrome DevTools
servers.description: Official Chrome DevTools MCP. Inspect pages, profile performance, debug network.

servers.name: Puppeteer
servers.description: Control a headless Chromium via Puppeteer for scraping and automation.

servers.name: Browserbase
servers.description: Run headless browsers in the cloud via Browserbase with session replay.

servers.name: Firecrawl
servers.description: Official Firecrawl MCP. Scrape, crawl, and extract structured data from any site.

servers.name: Apify
servers.description: Run thousands of Apify actors for web scraping and automation.

servers.name: Brave Search
servers.description: Official Brave Search MCP. Private web search with image and news.

servers.name: Tavily
servers.description: Official Tavily MCP server. AI-native search with extraction.

servers.name: Exa
servers.description: Neural web search for LLMs by Exa Labs.

servers.name: Kagi Search
servers.description: Official Kagi Search MCP. Premium ad-free web search.

servers.name: Perplexity
servers.description: Official Perplexity MCP. Ask Sonar for sourced, up-to-date answers.

servers.name: Slack
servers.description: Community-maintained Slack MCP server (formerly official). Read and post to channels.

servers.name: Discord
servers.description: Community Discord MCP. Read and post messages via a bot token.

servers.name: Gmail
servers.description: Send, search, and read Gmail messages.
servers.setupNotes: Follow the repo README to create a Google OAuth client; stores credentials locally.

servers.name: Twilio
servers.description: Official Twilio Labs MCP. Send SMS, make calls, manage numbers.

servers.name: Intercom
servers.description: Query and respond to Intercom conversations and contacts.

servers.name: Asana
servers.description: Query and update Asana tasks, projects, and workspaces.

servers.name: ClickUp
servers.description: Manage ClickUp tasks, lists, and spaces.

servers.name: Trello
servers.description: Manage Trello boards, lists, and cards.

envVars.name: TRELLO_TOKEN
envVars.description: Trello token (generated by clicking the 'Token' link on the app-key page).

servers.setupNotes: Visit the Power-Up admin page to get an API key, then click the Token link on that page to authorize and generate a token.

servers.name: Obsidian
servers.description: Read and search an Obsidian markdown vault.
servers.setupNotes: Replace <PATH_TO_VAULT> with the absolute path to your Obsidian vault directory.

servers.name: Google Drive
servers.description: Browse and read Google Drive files (archived reference).
servers.setupNotes: Requires OAuth client setup via Google Cloud — see repo README.

servers.name: Google Maps
servers.description: Places, geocoding, and directions via Google Maps (archived reference).

servers.name: HubSpot
servers.description: Official HubSpot MCP server. Query contacts, companies, and deals.
servers.setupNotes: Uses OAuth via HubSpot.

servers.name: Salesforce
servers.description: Query and modify Salesforce records with SOQL and metadata APIs.

envVars.name: SALESFORCE_INSTANCE_URL
envVars.description: Your org URL (optional for User_Password, REQUIRED for OAuth_2.0_Client_Credentials).

servers.setupNotes: Three auth modes: User_Password (default, needs username/password/token), OAuth_2.0_Client_Credentials (needs SALESFORCE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET/INSTANCE_URL), or Salesforce_CLI (requires `sf` CLI).

servers.name: Figma
servers.description: Official Figma MCP server. Fetch design context, variables, and frames.
servers.setupNotes: Remote MCP. Authenticates via Figma OAuth on first use. Local desktop-app MCP (http://127.0.0.1:3845/mcp) is also available if you enable it in Figma Preferences.

servers.name: Figma (Framelink)
servers.description: Community Figma context MCP. Lightweight frame-to-markdown extractor.

servers.name: PagerDuty
servers.description: Official PagerDuty MCP. Query incidents, services, and on-call.

envVars.name: PAGERDUTY_API_HOST
envVars.description: PagerDuty API host (use https://api.eu.pagerduty.com for EU accounts).

servers.name: Grafana
servers.description: Official Grafana MCP. Query dashboards, datasources, and alerts.
servers.setupNotes: Install `mcp-grafana` binary separately (`go install github.com/grafana/mcp-grafana/cmd/mcp-grafana@latest`).

servers.name: Datadog
servers.description: Query Datadog metrics, logs, and monitors.

servers.name: Hugging Face
servers.description: Official Hugging Face MCP. Search models, datasets, and run inference.

servers.name: ElevenLabs
servers.description: Official ElevenLabs MCP. Text-to-speech, voice cloning, and audio tools.
